title: 玄骐
content_json: [{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"0.36377713262160137","type":"illustrated-book","data":[{"key":"0.621db263ecdb","type":"tab-info","data":{"title":"","tabList":[{"key":"0.ecc481237e84","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-1","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1920/h_1080/50364/842288/2026/3/9/941017.jpg"],"type":"image"},{"key":"0.ab8be2dcb30cd","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-2","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_307/h_467/50364/842288/2026/3/9/236759.jpg"],"type":"image"}]}},{"key":"0.789fde19d2ffa","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"基本资料","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"玄骐"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者协会评定"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者玄骐，Re-A芯片状态正常，未见异常波动。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"超链协会奥芙里斯分会的第四副会长，以无可挑剔的工作能力而出名。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"学识渊博，带有几分书卷气，但并不文弱，而是文武兼备。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"个性孤高、冷淡，常年都是一副冷冰冰的表情，不会轻易表露情感，周身笼罩着一层生人勿进的气场，也不喜欢依赖别人，习惯性拒绝别人的帮助，总是独来独往。也因此显得个性孤僻，并没有在奥芙里斯分会交到什么朋友。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"他从不会刻意迎合别人，十分坦诚、直白，不会说出违心的称赞，也十分厌恶听见别人的奉承。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"总是一针见血地点出问题，有时甚至显得有些毒舌、说话带刺。但他本意并不是伤害别人，有时会为此感到内疚和苦恼。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"因为姐姐玄骊的完美和耀眼，玄骐的整个少年时期都在不被关注的孤独中度过。面对玄骊，他有着自己都无法抑制的嫉妒心，羡慕着玄骊的完美，而他也厌恶着这样虚伪的自己。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"为了追求与玄骊不同的「完美」，他一直在试着走出一条属于自己的道路。"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.bfc12efaafc","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"稀有度"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"SSR"}]}]}},{"key":"0.502fb7b7fb545","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"原质属性"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"恒定"},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_56/h_56/50364/842288/2026/3/9/974295.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"auto","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"22px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]}},{"key":"0.9099e02f2af1c","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"所属势力"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"协会"}]}]}},{"key":"0.41ce1002b410d","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"称号"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"霆渊若"}]}]}},{"key":"0.14f327b6b15db","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"性别"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"男"}]}]}},{"key":"0.6eb19b12c8557","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"职业"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"奥芙里斯分会
